title: Gooey Pistachio Irish Shortbread
description: A sweet and crumbly shortbread infused with the nutty flavor of pistachios, perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the pistachio meal and whisk until combined.
Add the irish butter and mix until the dough comes together.
Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter.
Place on the prepared baking sheet and bake for 18-20 minutes or until lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
